---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the problem, not the solution. "I want X" is less useful than "I can't do Y because Z". -->

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the feature. Be specific. -->

## Which component does this affect?

- [ ] jhara-core (Rust: scanner, detector, classifier, FFI)
- [ ] macOS app (Swift/SwiftUI UI, automation)
- [ ] Tauri app (Linux/Windows)
- [ ] Web dashboard / license portal
- [ ] CI/CD / tooling
- [ ] Documentation

## Have you looked at the roadmap?

<!-- Check ROADMAP.md first. If this is already planned, link to the relevant phase instead of filing a new request. -->

- [ ] I checked and this isn't already planned
- [ ] This is planned in Phase ___, but I have additional context or a different approach

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- What other approaches did you look at? Why didn't they work? -->

## Any other context

<!-- Screenshots, related issues, prior art in other tools, etc. -->
